CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This field uses a trigger to automatically sum the Amount of all Funding Sources that are designated Buyer Subsidy AND for which Assumable by Future Buyers is true.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This calculated summary field shows the sum of the Amount of all Funding Sources that are designated Buyer Subsidy AND for which Assumable by Future Buyers is true.
CustomField.label: Assumable Buyer Subsidy
